scan_interval.description: Minutes between each scan for new episodes.

download_delay.description: Seconds to wait between downloads. Recommended: 5-10 for rate limit prevention.

sleep_requests.description: Seconds to wait between API requests to streaming sites. Recommended: 1-3 for rate limit prevention.

rate_limit_sleep.description: Initial wait time in seconds when rate limited. Default is 900 (15 minutes). YouTube suggests up to 1 hour.

exponential_backoff.description: Enable exponential backoff when repeatedly rate limited.

backoff_multiplier.description: Multiply wait time by this factor on each subsequent rate limit.

sonarr.description: Connection settings for the Sonarr instance.

host.description: Sonarr server IP address or hostname.

port.description: Sonarr port number. Default Sonarr port is 8989.

apikey.description: Sonarr API key, found in Sonarr under Settings → General → Security.

ssl.description: Use HTTPS instead of HTTP when connecting to Sonarr.

basedir.description: Base URL path if Sonarr runs behind a reverse proxy (e.g. '/sonarr').

version.description: Set to 'v4' if running Sonarr v4 beta to enable v3 API endpoint compatibility.

ytdl.description: Global YT-DLP download settings applied to all series unless overridden.

default_format.description: Default YT-DLP format selector string. See https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp#format-selection for syntax.

merge_output_format.description: Output container format when merging video and audio streams.

services.description: Optional list of named service definitions. A service holds shared configuration (credentials, cookies, subtitles, offset, etc.) that series can inherit by referencing the service's title. Any key set at the series level overrides the same key from the service.

series.description: List of series to monitor and download. Each entry is either standalone (full URL, no service key) or service-linked (service name + relative URL path).

service_entry.description: A named service definition providing shared configuration for series that reference it.

title.description: Unique name for this service. Series reference it via the 'service' key.

url.description: Base URL for the service. Series using this service provide a relative path that is joined onto this URL.

cookies_file.description: Filename of the Netscape-format cookie file for authenticated content. Must be located in the config directory. Ensure the file has chmod 600 permissions.

username.description: Username for sites requiring authentication. Must be used together with 'password'.

password.description: Password for sites requiring authentication. Must be used together with 'username'. Ensure config.yml is chmod 600.

format.description: Default YT-DLP format string for all series on this service. Can be overridden per-series.

playlistreverse.description: Default playlist processing order for series on this service. Can be overridden per-series.

series_shared_overridable.description: Overridable fields that can be set at service level and overridden at series level.

title.description: Series name. Must match the series title in Sonarr exactly.

format.description: Override the format for this series. Falls back to the service format, then to ytdl.default_format.

cookies_file.description: Override the cookie file for this series. Falls back to the service cookies_file.

username.description: Override the username for this series. Must be used together with 'password'.

password.description: Override the password for this series. Must be used together with 'username'.

playlistreverse.description: Override the playlist processing order for this series.

series_standalone.description: A standalone series with a full absolute URL. Does not inherit from any service.

url.description: Full absolute URL of the YouTube channel or playlist to monitor.

series_linked.description: A series that inherits shared configuration from a named service. The 'url' is a relative path joined onto the service's base URL. Any key set here overrides the same key from the service.

service.description: Name of the service to inherit configuration from. Must match the 'title' of an entry in the top-level 'services' list.

url.description: Relative URL path appended to the service's base URL to form the full channel or playlist URL (e.g. 'channel/UCxxxxxxxx' or 'playlist?list=PLxxxxxxxx').

offset.description: Delay downloading an episode until this amount of time has passed after the air date. Useful for member early-access or embargoed content. All fields are optional and additive.

weeks.description: Number of weeks to wait after the air date.

days.description: Number of days to wait after the air date.

hours.description: Number of hours to wait after the air date.

minutes.description: Number of minutes to wait after the air date.

languages.description: List of ISO 639-1 language codes for subtitles to download.

autogenerated.description: Include auto-generated subtitles (e.g. YouTube auto-captions) in addition to manual subtitles.

regex.description: Regular expression patterns to transform episode titles before matching. Useful when YouTube and TVDB use different naming conventions.

sonarr.description: Transform the title as it appears in Sonarr before matching.

site.description: Transform the title as retrieved from the streaming site before matching.

match.description: Python-flavour regular expression pattern to find in the title.

replace.description: Replacement string. Use \1, \2, etc. for capture group back-references.
